'''âj-th-l-v''' ('''kajathlevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:joul|joul]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-th-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:joul|joul]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-th-l-v
|-
! Lemma
| kajathlevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijathlevoko|thijathlevoko]] || [[word:jijathlevoko|jijathlevoko]] || [[word:shijathlevoko|shijathlevoko]] || [[word:kijathlevoko|kijathlevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujathlevoko|thuthujathlevoko]] || [[word:jujujathlevoko|jujujathlevoko]] || [[word:shushujathlevoko|shushujathlevoko]] || [[word:kukujathlevoko|kukujathlevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujathlevoko|thujathlevoko]] || [[word:jujathlevoko|jujathlevoko]] || [[word:shujathlevoko|shujathlevoko]] || [[word:kujathlevoko|kujathlevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujathlevoko|thujathlevoko]] || [[word:jujathlevoko|jujathlevoko]] || [[word:shujathlevoko|shujathlevoko]] || [[word:kujathlevoko|kujathlevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejathlevoko|thejathlevoko]] || [[word:jejathlevoko|jejathlevoko]] || [[word:shejathlevoko|shejathlevoko]] || [[word:kejathlevoko|kejathlevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojathlevoko|thothojathlevoko]] || [[word:jojojathlevoko|jojojathlevoko]] || [[word:shoshojathlevoko|shoshojathlevoko]] || [[word:kokojathlevoko|kokojathlevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojathlevoko|thojathlevoko]] || [[word:jojathlevoko|jojathlevoko]] || [[word:shojathlevoko|shojathlevoko]] || [[word:kojathlevoko|kojathlevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojathlevoko|thojathlevoko]] || [[word:jojathlevoko|jojathlevoko]] || [[word:shojathlevoko|shojathlevoko]] || [[word:kojathlevoko|kojathlevoko]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jathlevoko|jathlevoko]] || [[word:jathlevoko|jathlevoko]] || [[word:jathlevoko|jathlevoko]] || [[word:jathlevoko|jathlevoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jathlevoko|jathlevoko]] || [[word:jathlevoko|jathlevoko]] || [[word:jathlevoko|jathlevoko]] || [[word:jathlevoko|jathlevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjathlevoko|thĂŠjathlevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjathlevoko|jĂŠjathlevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjathlevoko|shĂŠjathlevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjathlevoko|kĂŠjathlevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajathlevoko|thathajathlevoko]] || [[word:jajajathlevoko|jajajathlevoko]] || [[word:shashajathlevoko|shashajathlevoko]] || [[word:kakajathlevoko|kakajathlevoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajathlevoko|thajathlevoko]] || [[word:jajathlevoko|jajathlevoko]] || [[word:shajathlevoko|shajathlevoko]] || [[word:kajathlevoko|kajathlevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajathlevithi|shajathlevithi]] || [[word:shajathleviji|shajathleviji]] || [[word:shajathlevishi|shajathlevishi]] || [[word:shajathleviki|shajathleviki]]
